data.body: PS5 full make test: 5858 passed, 3 failed. (1) yaml flake (ignore). (2) test_module_size_contract::test_allowlist_equals_computed_over_cap_set — shrink brought attest.py 913->696 (under 800 soft cap) so the module-size allowlist/ceilings drifted, needs update. (3) test_child_closure_trust (tests/interfaces/store) — REAL regression from my compute_validity op-cert change: a freshly-signed certified completion-verifier child reads as not-valid so parent certifiable=False. Both missed by subagents' selective test runs; full make test caught them. Delegating fix for (2)+(3).
